paper_title: THE EFFECTS OF PROBIOTIC SUPPLEMENTATION ON GROWTH PERFORMANCE OF WEANING PIGS IN THE MEKONG DELTA OF VIETNAM

entities.id: THE EFFECTS OF PROBIOTIC SUPPLEMENTATION ON GROWTH PERFORMANCE OF WEANING PIGS IN THE MEKONG DELTA OF VIETNAM
entities.description: The main research topic investigating probiotic effects on piglets.
The primary field of research concerning livestock husbandry and nutrition.
Researcher from the College of Agriculture and Applied Biology.
Educational and research institution in Vietnam.
The practice of adding beneficial microorganisms to animal feed.
Metrics related to weight gain and feed efficiency in livestock.
Probiotic product containing Bacillus subtilis and Lactobacillus spp.
Probiotic product containing PRO plus neomycine sulphate.
Experimental group with no bioproduct supply.
Experimental design using 3 treatments and 12 blocks.
Biochemical tests (Indol, Methyl Red, Voges Proskauer, and Citrate) used to confirm E. coli.
Statistical analysis using Minitab Software version 16.
Data collected from 108 DYL piglets over a 5-week experimental period.
The starting weight of the piglets.
The weight of the piglets at the end of the experiment.
